word: H3932 - לָעַג - lâʻag - law-ag' - Have in derision

sections.paragraph:
Original: לעג

Transliteration: lâ‛ag

Phonetic: law-ag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to mock, deride, ridicule
    1. (Qal) to mock, deride, have in derision
    2. (Niphal) to stammer
    3. (Hiphil) to mock, deride

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1118

Part(s) of speech: Verb
